subcodes.first_line: Knowest thou who maketh mention of thee, and knowest thou who calleth thee from this glorious and wondrous Station? Say: Yea, by my Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هل تعرف من یذکرک و هل تعرف من ینادیک من هذا المقام العزیز البدیع قل ای و ربی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @nearness and remoteness, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
